channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Tuesday, March 31
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 02:47 AM (1.531 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 09:29 AM (0.15 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: E 14 G 21 mph
